name: 高翊凱 Kim Kao
bio: AWS 解決方案架構經理、DDD Taiwan 共同創辦人。專注於把商業策略轉譯成能真正落地的架構決策 — 在 Architect Elevator 上，每天穿梭於頂樓與引擎室之間。《領域故事化》技術審校、DDD 15 週年文集共同譯者。
bioEn: Solutions Architecture Manager at AWS and co-founder of DDD Taiwan. Focused on translating business strategy into architecture decisions that actually ship — riding the Architect Elevator between the penthouse and the engine room every day. Technical reviewer of Domain Storytelling (zh-Hant) and co-translator of the DDD 15th-anniversary anthology.
